info.title: Ilex Inventory API
info.description: Ilex Inventory Server — F&B CPG inventory management.

post.description:
Authenticate an existing user and set session cookie.

CSRF-exempt: same reasoning as SignupView.
post.summary: Log in with email and password

post.description:
Clear the session. Requires an active session (IsAuthenticated).

CSRF token required (default SessionAuthentication behavior).

get.description:
Return the currently authenticated user.

Returns 401 when no session is present (IsAuthenticated default).

post.description:
Create a new account and log in immediately.

CSRF-exempt: client cannot have a CSRF token before first login.
Achieved by setting authentication_classes=[] which disables DRF's
SessionAuthentication CSRF enforcement.

get.description: GET /batches — list batches for the authenticated owner.
GET /batches/{id} — return batch with on_hand + recall state.

post.description: POST /batches/{id}/movements — record a movement (adjustment or write_off).

get.description:
Liveness probe with Postgres reachability check.

Anonymous — no auth, no CSRF (GET only).

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: Filter by product UUID (via batch join)

get.description:
GET /products — list + search + filter.
POST /products — create a new product.

post.description:
GET /products — list + search + filter.
POST /products — create a new product.
POST /products/import — multipart CSV upload with idempotency.

get.description:
GET /purchase-orders — list with filters + pagination.
POST /purchase-orders — create a draft PO.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status: draft or received

post.description:
GET /purchase-orders — list with filters + pagination.
POST /purchase-orders — create a draft PO.

get.summary: Get a purchase order by ID

post.summary: Receive a purchase order (requires Idempotency-Key header)

PatchedProductUpdateRequest.description:
PATCH /products/{id} — only name and description are patchable.

Any other key (including `sku`) is rejected: DRF strict-mode via
validate() to keep the serializer layer clean of SKU-lock business logic.
